name: stageflow
description: Standardize Stageflow planning flows with durable request artifacts and validation gates.

interface.shortDescription: Plan Codex work and expose Simple Workflow plus atomic-docs.
interface.longDescription: Stageflow helps Codex inspect a project, clarify requirements, preserve request-specific artifacts, review plans, require explicit approval, proceed from a validated plan, and expose an atomic-docs skill for storage-mode-aware atomic documentation that preserves user intent, implementation state, planned changes, gaps, source-code baselines, and graph relationships. It also exposes Simple Workflow for a lightweight reviewed plan.md flow, atomic-impl for docs-first implementation from approved atomic-docs requirements, and multi-repo-worktree for explicitly invoked low-interruption permanent worktrees with one-time create, repeated same-branch submit, and help, status, pull, and sync workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use Stageflow to plan this change before coding.
Use Stageflow to clarify this request and create a validated plan.
Use Simple Workflow to capture requirements, write plan.md, review it internally, and wait for approval.
Use atomic-docs to create storage-mode-aware project documentation.
Use atomic-docs to refresh atom files from source-code changes.
Use atomic-docs to inspect intent, implementation, planned changes, and gaps.
Use atomic-impl to write requirements into atomic docs before implementing code.
Use $stageflow:multi-repo-worktree submit to publish the current multi-repo worktree without routine re-approval.
